description_long: This is a tall, cylindrical bottle with a striking deep blue color, adorned with ornate gold bands featuring a Greek key pattern near the top and bottom of the main body. The bottle's neck is slender and capped with a matching blue and gold closure, which appears textured. The central body of the bottle displays a cosmic or starry sky motif, giving it a luxurious and decorative appearance. One side of the bottle (view 2) features a circular emblem or medallion with intricate gold detailing and some text, while the other sides are dominated by the blue starry design. The bottle appears to be made of glass, with metallic decorative elements and a likely plastic or metal cap. Its overall finish is smooth and glossy, reflecting light subtly.
description: A tall, deep blue bottle with ornate gold bands and a cosmic starry design, featuring a decorative cap and a circular emblem on one side.
description_view_0: The bottle is shown with its blue starry design and gold bands visible, no emblem or text is present on this side.
description_view_1: Similar to view 0, this side displays the blue starry motif and gold bands, with no visible emblem or text.
description_view_2: This view reveals a circular gold emblem or medallion with intricate detailing and some text, set against the blue starry background.
description_view_3: This side mirrors views 0 and 1, showing the blue starry design and gold bands, without any emblem or text.
attribute_label_or_branding: A circular gold emblem with intricate detailing and some text is visible on one side of the bottle; the rest of the bottle is decorated with a starry blue design and gold Greek key patterns.
